chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.T.R.A 362 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.10 2. For hearing of CMA No.2662/2024 3. For hearing of main case 22.09.2025 Mr. Muzaffar Ali, advocate for the applicant Syed Mohsin Shah, advocate holds brief for Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent This reference application is pending since 2024 without any progress. On 01.10.2024 counsel needed time to prepare his brief, same request is made today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in pursuing this matter, therefore, in view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
